args:
set -eu
root=$(mktemp -d)
prepare_prefill="$root/prepare-prefill"
prepare_decode="$root/prepare-decode"
prepare_distributed="$root/prepare-distributed"
prepare_replay_safe="$root/prepare-replay-safe"
measure_prefill="$root/measure-prefill"
measure_distributed="$root/measure-distributed"
measure_replay_safe="$root/measure-replay-safe"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare prefill-path --out "$prepare_prefill" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare decode-path --out "$prepare_decode" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare distributed-flashinfer-startup --out "$prepare_distributed" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare replay-safe-closure --out "$prepare_replay_safe" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure prefill-path --out "$measure_prefill" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure distributed-flashinfer-startup --out "$measure_distributed" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure replay-safe-closure --out "$measure_replay_safe" >/dev/null
python3 - "$prepare_prefill/buildplan.json" "$prepare_decode/buildplan.json" "$prepare_distributed/materialization_report.json" "$prepare_replay_safe/materialization_report.json" "$measure_prefill/measurement_report.json" "$measure_distributed/measurement_report.json" "$measure_replay_safe/measurement_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
prepare_prefill = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
prepare_decode = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
prepare_distributed = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
prepare_replay_safe = json.load(open(sys.argv[4]))
measure_prefill = json.load(open(sys.argv[5]))
measure_distributed = json.load(open(sys.argv[6]))
measure_replay_safe = json.load(open(sys.argv[7]))
prefill_regions = [region['name'] for region in prepare_prefill['compile_regions']]
decode_regions = [region['name'] for region in prepare_decode['compile_regions']]
assert prefill_regions == ['prefill_attention'], prefill_regions
assert decode_regions == ['decode_attention'], decode_regions
assert prepare_distributed['closure_outcome'] == 'full_compile_closure'
assert prepare_replay_safe['verify_replay_compile_free'] is True
for report, intent in [
    (measure_prefill, 'prefill_path'),
    (measure_distributed, 'distributed_flashinfer_startup'),
    (measure_replay_safe, 'replay_safe_closure'),
]:
    assert report['intent'] == intent, report['intent']
    assert report['closure_outcome'] == 'full_compile_closure', report['closure_outcome']
    assert report['phase_timings']['cold_materialization_ms'] >= report['phase_timings']['warm_materialization_ms']
    assert report['cold_unique_artifact_bytes_delta'] >= 0
    assert report['warm_unique_artifact_bytes_delta'] >= 0
PY
printf 'explore-materialization-surface-matrix\n'
